Functions and headers for ARM MCU management and OS macros for assertions, memory, and mutexes.

## Folders
- **[mcu](mcu/README.md)**: Functions and headers for cache management, FPU cleanup, interrupt handling, and privilege management on ARM MCUs.
- **[os](os/README.md)**: Macros for runtime assertions, memory allocation functions, mutex structures, and tick conversion functions.
